title: HOOK — Sara reads, Eva freezes mid-yawn
prompt: Wide shot in @living-room, soft golden early-morning sunlight from the sliding-door wall. @Sara sits cross-legged on the LEFT side of the rainbow afghan couch in cozy pajamas, holding @brave-tooth-book open in her lap, reading aloud cheerfully. @Eva is already sitting RIGHT next to Sara on the same couch in matching pajamas, sleepy and mid-yawn with a soft blanket around her shoulders — then suddenly stops yawning and freezes, eyes wide, as she catches the word from the book. Sara (reading aloud, animated, looking down at the book): "And then the brave little tooth said: I'm not SCARED of the dentist!" Eva (frozen beside her, small panicked voice): "...d-d-DENTIST?" Sara looks up brightly: "Yeah, silly — TODAY's the day!" Eva's lower lip starts to tremble.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, second mother, two Papa, two Mama, identical adults, extra people, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, mirror reflection, family members, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors
